Available commands:
codex [ chat | compact | config | container | goal | interrupt | status | help ] - agent lifecycle and config
component [ <component> | list | help ] - component setup and inspection
config [ get | list | set | help ] - global instance config
heartbeat [ now | start | status | stop | help ] - autonomous keepalive and self-scheduling
run <command> - Run a whitelisted host command
search <query> - Search indexed chat messages
send - Send an outbound message from stdin
send <text> - Send an outbound message; hostbridge reads stdin when message args are omitted
sendfile <path> - Send an outbound file; hostbridge reads stdin when path is omitted
status - Show current thread status
theater [ <name> | create | list | status | help ] - publish/subscribe message channels between agents
thread [ <thread> | config | label | list | status | help ] - direct messaging to other agent threads
turn [ config | info | help ] - current turn metadata and output controls
